_meta.description: Golden-master characterization of the BDC IMS compatibility engine. Captures CURRENT verdicts (bugs included) for every server_configurations row in the production dump. Regenerate with tests/characterize_compatibility.php after re-seeding the scratch DB. See tests/golden/README.md. DO NOT hand-edit.
